_comment: HON-08 doctrine — last-verified manifest. Sidecar (not in-doc frontmatter) so stamping a doc never shifts its line numbers and breaks path:line cross-references. Re-stamp a doc's date (YYYY-MM-DD) when you re-verify its claims. The doc-last-verified sentinel fails if any listed doc is missing or its date is >90 days old. Add a doc here once its claims are verified; removals only when a doc is retired.
